provenance.notes: Top-level category scaffold. Rescue/history buckets are canonical-derived rescue-order-index membership artifacts; character cats remain community-curated and are not official protocol traits.

genesis.label: Genesis Cats
genesis.notes: Genesis supply/generation are documented in data/special-cats.json and data/protocol-constants.json. Canonical-derived rescue-order-index membership lives in data/rescue-buckets.json; exact catIds are not materialized here.

characterCats.label: Character Cats
characterCats.notes: Community-curated narrative categories, not official protocol traits. Exact community-curated rescue-order index membership lives in data/character-cat-index.json; ids remain empty here to avoid duplicating large arrays.

specialCats.label: Special Cats
specialCats.notes: Genesis source facts are partially verified; canonical-derived rescue/history bucket indexes live in data/rescue-buckets.json. Other special categories remain placeholders.

todos: Confirm/document the index convention used by data/character-cat-index.json before downstream UI/tool use.
Document the derivation method for data/rescue-buckets.json before downstream UI/tool use.
Define conversion from rescue-order-index to catId/token-facing identifiers before using bucket values outside rescue-order context.
Keep community-curated categories separate from official protocol traits.
